start.title: The Frozen Surface
start.text: A frozen lake stretches before you, its surface split by long black cracks beneath the ice.

cross.title: Groaning Ice
cross.text: The ice groans beneath your weight the entire way across. Something dark moves far below the frozen surface.

leave.title: Longer Route
leave.text: You choose the safer path, though the journey around the lake costs you valuable daylight.
